name: Nitto Kohki Co., Ltd.
summary: Nitto Kohki Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells connecting fluid couplings, labor-saving machine tools, and linear motor driven free piston pumps and other pumps for various applications. The company operates through Quick Connect Coupling Business, Power & Machine Tools Business, Pumps & Compressors Business, and Door Closers Business segments. The company offers power and machine tools for boring, cutting, grinding, and scaling of steel materials; electric screwdrivers for assembling electronic devices, such as PCs, smartphones, printers and automotive components; and blowers. It also provides pumps and compressors for various fields, including medical, research, food, and electronic manufacturing industries; and door closers for medical facilities, offices, and transportation equipment. The company operates in Japan, the Americas, Europe, East Asia, Southeast Asia, and Asia and Oceania. Nitto Kohki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
